assertionResults.reason: Agent name text used JetBrains Mono but rendered at 13px (contract requires 11-12px), and only idle-style indicator evidence was present.
Tab styling matched brutalist traits (11px mono, transparent bg, no radius), but required Idle tab was not present; UI shows All/Active/Paused/Error.
Issue title and square indicator checks were observable, but row-divider behavior could not be fully validated because only one row existed and last-row styling removed the divider.
Search input matched transparent 1px-border monospace style, but filter controls did not match the same styling (buttons had fully transparent border colors).
6x6 square idle indicators (transparent + border, radius 0) were observed, but no alive/error indicator instances were available in this dataset to confirm required #82E88A/#FF6060 semantic colors.

Multiple button instances were transparent/no-radius/mono, but several did not have a visible 1px white border (border colors were transparent or translucent), violating the button primitive contract.

frictions.description: `agent-browser network requests` on the Agents page returned 'No requests captured' despite active polling.
frictions.resolution: Captured a consolidated network log later in session (`group-b-network-api.txt`) containing `/api/agents` and `/api/issues` fetches.

frictions.description: Dataset had limited entities (single visible agent/issue), reducing observable state coverage for color/divider assertions.

blockers.description: No alive/error status indicator instances were available to verify semantic color mappings required by VAL-GUI-FOUND-004.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked dashboard, issues, and agents active views; only idle-style indicators were present.

blockers.description: Only one issue row was present and last-row rule removed divider, preventing direct 1px row-divider observation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Inspected row class/ancestor styles and captured computed-style audit evidence.

appliedUpdates: Invoked agent-browser skill and validated six assigned GUI assertions through read-only navigation/inspection.
Captured assertion screenshots, computed-style/DOM audits, console checks, and network logs under mission evidence path.
Wrote flow report JSON to assigned validation output path; no product code or data mutations performed.
summary: Validated 6 assigned assertions for gui-core-pages group-b: 0 pass, 4 fail, 2 blocked. Failures were primarily design-system mismatches in tabs/buttons/font sizing; blocked items were due to missing live data states required for full color/divider verification.
